final:
module top_module(
    input too_cold,
    input too_hot,
    input mode,
    input fan_on,
    output heater,
    output aircon,
    output fan
);assign fan = fan_on | heater | aircon;
    assign heater = mode & too_cold;
    assign aircon = ~mode & too_hot;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      heater <= ~mode & ~too_hot; aircon <= mode & ~too_cold; fan <= ~fan_on & ~heater & ~aircon;
    end
  end

endmodule
